description:
Perform live forensic analysis on a currently mounted VeraCrypt volume. 

Starting state: A VeraCrypt volume is ALREADY MOUNTED at '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot2'. The VeraCrypt GUI is open.

Your Goal:
1. Identify the hidden backing container file location (it is disguised as a system file).
2. Identify the Encryption Algorithm and Hash Algorithm used.
3. Count the number of files inside the mounted volume.
4. Create a JSON report at '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_report.json' with this exact structure:
   {
     "container_path": "/full/path/to/file.dat",
     "encryption_algorithm": "Name",
     "hash_algorithm": "Name",
     "file_count": X
   }
5. SAFELY DISMOUNT the volume when finished.

Do not modify the contents of the volume.
